title: Aegeus' 3D Spears
description: gives all spears 3d models and textures
body:
# **Aegeus' 3D Spears**

### **ABOUT**
This resource pack gives the 1.21.11 spears clean 3d models.

### **COMPATIBILITY**
Works in versions 1.21.11\
32x

### **SUPPORT ME**
I have just started making textures and you can support me by downloading this and future uploads. Thank you and enjoy!
